_**Agent (model claude-4.5-opus-high-thinking, mode Agent)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user is referring to a tooltip that appears on the Create button when the last message is an agent message (not a user message). Looking at the code, I can see this tooltip around lines 1042-1050:

```jsx
{isLastMessageAgent && !isCreating && !isLoading && (
  <div className="absolute bottom-full mb-2 right-0 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity pointer-events-none z-50">
    <div className="px-3 py-2 text-sm text-gray-900 bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg whitespace-nowrap max-w-[280px]">
      A test should end with a user message, or a tool. Not
      agent text message.
    </div>
    {/* Arrow */}
    <div className="absolute top-full right-4 -mt-1 w-0 h-0 border-l-[6px] border-l-transparent border-r-[6px] border-r-transparent border-t-[6px] border-t-white"></div>
  </div>
)}
```

The issue is that the tooltip has `whitespace-nowrap` which prevents text from wrapping, but also has `max-w-[280px]` which limits the width. These two properties conflict - the text can't wrap because of `whitespace-nowrap`, but the container is limited to 280px, causing overflow.

The fix is to remove `whitespace-nowrap` so the text can wrap within the max-width constraint. Let me make this change.</details></think>

---

Looking at the tooltip code around lines 1042-1050, I can see the issue. The tooltip has both `whitespace-nowrap` (which prevents text wrapping) and `max-w-[280px]` (which limits width), causing the text to overflow.

I'll remove `whitespace-nowrap` so the text can wrap properly within the container:

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="search_replace">

<details><summary>Tool use: **search_replace** • Edit file: /Users/aman/Documents/repos/artpark/pense-frontend/src/app/tests/page.tsx</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 1, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1042,5 +1042,5 @@
                      {isLastMessageAgent &amp;&amp; !isCreating &amp;&amp; !isLoading &amp;&amp; (
                        &lt;div className="absolute bottom-full mb-2 right-0 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity pointer-events-none z-50"&gt;
-                         &lt;div className="px-3 py-2 text-sm text-gray-900 bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg whitespace-nowrap max-w-[280px]"&gt;
+                         &lt;div className="px-3 py-2 text-sm text-gray-900 bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg max-w-[280px]"&gt;
                            A test should end with a user message, or a tool. Not
                            agent text message.
```

</details>

</tool-use>

---

I've removed the `whitespace-nowrap` class from the tooltip, which was preventing the text from wrapping. Now the text will properly wrap within the `max-w-[280px]` container instead of overflowing.
